custom-size-enabled.tooltip: Allows resizing the panel length instead of spanning the entire screen edge.

next-panel-button.tooltip: Cycles to configure the next active panel and highlights it.

prev-panel-button.tooltip: Cycles to configure the previous active panel and highlights it.

selected-panel-size.tooltip: Adjusts the size (width for horizontal, height for vertical) of the currently highlighted panel.

selected-panel-floating.tooltip: Detaches the currently highlighted panel from the screen edge.

selected-panel-floating-offset.tooltip: Distance in pixels between the currently highlighted panel and the screen edge.
